mapper.sql: a.id, a.title, a.content, a.summary, a.category_id, a.user_id, a.status, a.view_count, a.is_top, a.created_at, a.updated_at, c.name AS category_name, u.username AS user_username, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.avatar AS user_avatar
mapper.select: SELECT FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.status = 1 AND a.is_top = 1 ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.category_id = #{categoryId} AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, content, summary, category_id, user_id, status, view_count, is_top) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{isTop})
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, summary = #{summary}, category_id = #{categoryId}, status = #{status}, is_top = #{isTop} WHERE id = #{id}
